title: HTS Code List Announced for Copper Products Subject to Additional U.S. Tariffs
bodyHtml:
The list of HS codes for "semi-finished copper and derivative copper products," which are now subject to an additional 50% tariff by the United States as of today, has been announced.

In a statement issued by U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP), it has been clarified which tariff classifications are subject to these additional duties.

The additional tariff will apply only to the copper content of the relevant goods. For items listed as derivative copper products that do not contain copper, the additional tariff will be 0%.

Click here to view the relevant announcement and the full list of covered tariff classifications.

LIST OF COPPER HTSUS

Effective August 1, 2025.

See the Harmonized Tariff Schedule of the United States for the authoritative list.

9903.78.01 and 9903.78.02: Applies to all imported semi-finished copper and intensive copper derivative products
